title: AuditVerificationReport
description: Protocol-owned machine-readable verification output for authoritative local audit integrity and posture checks. Stored as audit_verification_report artifacts.

status.description: Closed status enum for verification dimensions.

findingSeverity.description: Closed severity enum for machine-readable verifier findings.

finding.description: One deterministic verifier finding entry with stable code and typed scope references.

message.description: Deterministic human-readable summary for this finding.

segment_id.description: Optional segment identifier targeted by this finding.

subject_record_digest.description: Optional signed-object digest targeted by this finding.

related_record_digests.description: Optional additional signed-object digests related to this finding.

items.description: One related signed-object digest for this finding.

details.description: Optional structured details for this finding entry.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for audit verification reports.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this audit verification report.

scope_kind.description: Kind of ledger scope verified by this report.

first_segment_id.description: First segment identifier in scope when scope_kind is segment_range.

last_segment_id.description: Last segment identifier in scope when scope_kind is segment or segment_range.

verification_scope.description: Ledger scope verified by this report.

cryptographically_valid.description: Whether all checked signatures and hash commitments were cryptographically valid.

historically_admissible.description: Whether signer and evidence posture were admissible for the event/seal/receipt timestamps.

currently_degraded.description: Whether current trust posture is degraded despite historical admissibility (for example retired/revoked signers after event time).

integrity_status.description: Integrity dimension status for the verified scope.

anchoring_status.description: Anchoring posture status for the verified scope.

storage_posture_status.description: Storage-protection posture status for the verified scope.

segment_lifecycle_status.description: Segment lifecycle posture status for the verified scope.

degraded_reasons.description: Stable reason codes for degraded-but-not-failed posture.

items.description: One degraded-posture reason code from the audit_verification_reason_code registry.

hard_failures.description: Stable reason codes for fail-closed verification failures.

items.description: One hard-failure reason code from the audit_verification_reason_code registry.

findings.description: Deterministic verifier findings for this report scope.

summary.description: Optional concise human-readable summary of report posture.
